title: lobelia anceps var. minor
intro: Lobelia anceps var. minor, also known as Lobelia minor, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Campanulaceae. It is a herb with medicinal properties that has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Lobelia minor is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reduce pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
